userStories.title: Ensure full test coverage on email-sending logic before refactor
userStories.description: Audit `src/notifications/notifications.service.ts` for untested email-sending paths. Add missing unit tests in `src/notifications/__tests__/notifications.service.test.ts`. Do not change production code in this story. Verify with: `npm test -- --grep 'notifications'`.

userStories.title: Extract email sending into EmailService class
userStories.description: Create `src/email/email.service.ts` with a class `EmailService` that wraps the current email transport logic extracted from `notifications.service.ts`. Move only the transport/send logic — keep notification business logic in place. Verify with: `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm test`.

userStories.title: Update NotificationsService to use EmailService
userStories.description: In `src/notifications/notifications.service.ts`, replace direct transport calls with injected `EmailService`. Existing tests must still pass without modification. Verify with: `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm test`.
